transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Are you going to the math tutoring session after class?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. I want someone to explain yesterday's homework before the quiz.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the man going to the tutoring session?

questions.prompt: Why is the man going to the tutoring session?

choices.text: To prepare for an upcoming quiz.

questions.explanation: He wants help understanding the homework before the quiz.
questions.evidence: I want someone to explain yesterday's homework before the quiz.
